title: Holidays in Taiwan
details: Highlights: Sisi Youth Village, Pineapple Cake DIY, Zhongshe Flower Market, Yehliu Geopark, Shifen Old Street & Waterfall, Flying Sky Lantern Experience, Taipei 101 (photo stop), Ximending Shopping Street, Chiang Kai-shek Memorial Hall, and Everrich Duty Free Shopping. A perfect mix of city tours, culture, and scenic countryside in Taiwan.

itinerary.day_details: Arrival at Taoyuan International Airport. Meet and greet with local tour guide. Visit Pineapple Cake DIY and Sisi Youth Village for photo stop. Proceed to Taipei 101 (photo stop only, no observatory). Hotel check-in and overnight in Taipei.
After breakfast, transfer to Taichung. Visit Zhongshe Flower Market and National Taichung Theater. Experience pineapple cake making before heading back to Taipei. Hotel check-in and overnight.
After breakfast, visit Yehliu Geopark. Continue to Shifen Old Street and Shifen Waterfall. Experience Flying Sky Lantern (1 lantern per 4 pax). Return to Taipei for overnight.
After breakfast, hotel check-out. Visit Everrich Duty Free Shopping and Chiang Kai-shek Memorial Hall. Lunch included. Free time at Ximending Shopping Street. Transfer to airport for departure.
Arrival back in Manila. Home sweet home!

inclusions: 3 nights accommodation in 4★ hotel or similar
Fully loaded tours as per itinerary
Taichung tour with Zhongshe Flower Market
extra_details: Remaining balance payable 45 days before travel date.
Itineraries are subject to change without prior notice due to local circumstances.
